title: zabelia brachystemon
intro: Zabelia brachystemon, also known as the Korean mint or Korean boxwood, is a flowering plant species native to Korea. Its medicinal properties have been utilized in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial effects. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving headaches and respiratory issues, and promoting digestion. In herbal preparations, Zabelia brachystemon is often used as a tea or tincture, and can also be applied topically as a poultice or salve to aid in wound healing and skin issues.
